FileEntry.title: FileEntry
FileEntry.description: Represents a physical file metadata stored in Firestore pointing to Google Drive

id.description: The unique ID of the file entry

driveLink.description: The URL of the Google Drive document physical file

FolderEntry.title: FolderEntry
FolderEntry.description: Represents a directory folder metadata stored in Firestore

id.description: The unique ID of the folder entry

driveLink.description: The URL of the Google Drive folder physical link or 'javascript:void(0)'

files.description: Firestore collection containing all uploaded files

folders.description: Firestore collection containing all user-created folders
